title: astragalus parvicarinatus
intro: Astragalus parvicarinatus is a species of legume in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is known for its adaptogenic properties and is often referred to as "huang qi". The medicinal properties of Astragalus parvicarinatus include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus parvicarinatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, which are often used to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
